name: SAS Forecasting & Optimization
description: Enterprise-scale automated forecasting engine that handles millions of time series with automatic model selection, hierarchical reconciliation, and mathematical optimization for resource allocation, demand planning, and supply chain efficiency.
elevatorPitch: Enterprise-scale automated forecasting across millions of time series with mathematical optimization for resource allocation.
capabilities: Promotional lift modeling and cannibalization effects
Demand sensing with short-horizon signal detection
targetBuyer: VP of Supply Chain, Head of Planning, CFO, COO, Head of Data Science
